hotels.name: Hotel O Thergoan Formerly P1 Staycation
hotels.description_fr:
L’établissement Hotel O Thergoan Formerly P1 Staycation se situe à Pune, à respectivement 11 km et 14 km de ces lieux d’intérêt : Université de Pune et Temple et grotte Pataleshwar. Il propose des hébergements dotés de la climatisation et d’une salle de bains privative. Cet hôtel 2 étoiles propose un service d'étage, une réception ouverte 24h/24 et une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite. Cet hôtel possède des chambres familiales.

Tous les hébergements sont pourvus d’un coin salon, d’une télévision à écran plat avec les chaînes du satellite ainsi que d’une salle de bains privative avec une baignoire ou une douche et des articles de toilette gratuits. Des serviettes et du linge de lit sont fournis.
hotels.description_en:
About this property

Comfortable Accommodations: Hotel O Thergoan Formerly P1 Staycation in Pune offers family rooms with air-conditioning, private bathrooms, work desks, and seating areas. Each room includes free toiletries, a bath or shower, TV, tiled floors, and a wardrobe.

Essential Facilities: Guests enjoy free WiFi, a 24-hour front desk, daily housekeeping service, room service, and luggage storage. The hotel provides a welcoming environment with English and Hindi spoken at reception.

Local Attractions: Located 11 km from the University of Pune, 13 km from Pataleshwar Cave Temple, and 14 km from Bund Garden. Other nearby sites include Srimant Dagadusheth Halwai Ganapati Temple and Shaniwar Wada, each approximately 14 km away. Pune International Airport is 18 km from the hotel.
hotels.description_es:
Hotel O Thergoan Formerly P1 Staycation, que está a 11 km de Universidad de Savitribai Phule Pune y a 14 km de Templo Pataleshwar, ofrece habitaciones con aire acondicionado y baño privado en Pune. Este hotel de 2 estrellas ofrece servicio de habitaciones, recepción 24 horas y wifi gratis. El hotel tiene habitaciones familiares.

Las unidades de este alojamiento están equipadas con zona de estar, TV de pantalla plana con canales vía satélite y baño privado con artículos de aseo gratuitos y bañera o ducha. En el hotel, cada habitación cuenta con ropa de cama y toallas.

Parque Bund está a 14 km del alojamiento, y Templo de Srimant Dagadusheth Halwai Ganapati está a 15 km. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Pune) está a 18 km.
hotels.description_pt:
A cerca de 11 km de Universidade de Pune e a 14 km de Templo Pataleshwar, Hotel O Thergoan Formerly P1 Staycation dispõe de quartos com ar condicionado e casa de banho privada em Pune. Este hotel de 2 estrelas dispõe de serviço de quartos, uma receção aberta 24 horas e acesso Wi-Fi gratuito. O alojamento tem quartos familiares.

As unidades do alojamento incluem área de estar, uma televisão de ecrã plano com canais por satélite e casa de banho privativa com produtos de higiene pessoal gratuitos e banheira ou chuveiro. No alojamento, os quartos estão equipados com roupa de cama e toalhas.

Jardim de Pune fica a 14 km de Hotel O Thergoan Formerly P1 Staycation, enquanto Templo Srimant Dagadusheth Halwai Ganapati está a 15 km da propriedade.
hotels.description_it:
Posizionato a 11 km da Università di Pune e 14 km da Tempio Pataleshwar, Hotel O Thergoan Formerly P1 Staycation mette a disposizione camere con aria condizionata e bagno a uso esclusivo, a Pune. Questo hotel a 2 stelle offre il servizo in camera, una reception 24 ore su 24 e il WiFi gratuito. Questo hotel offre camere familiari.

Le unità presso questo hotel comprendono un’area salotto, una TV a schermo piatto con canali satellitari e un bagno privato con set di cortesia e vasca o doccia. Presso Hotel O Thergoan Formerly P1 Staycation, le camere sono dotate di lenzuola e asciugamani.

Bund Garden è a 14 km da questa struttura, mentre Tempio Shreemant Dagdusheth Halwai Ganpati Mandir si trova a 15 km dalla struttura. Aeroporto Internazionale di Pune si trova a 18 km di distanza.

hotels.name: Conrad Pune
hotels.description_fr:
The smart luxury and intuitive service of the Conrad Hotels & Resorts brand debuted in India with Conrad Pune. Located in the heart of the central business district, the hotel offers easy access to the city’s IT, residential, commercial, entertainment districts and business hubs including Magarpatta, Kharadi, Hinjewadi and Pimpri-Chinchwad, as well as the airport.
The hotel’s 351 luxurious guest rooms including 20 suites offer the very latest in-room technology and luxuries like signature Conrad amenities, plush bedding and five-fixture marble bathrooms with walk-in rain showers and soak tubs. The Executive Lounge on Level 13 is an exclusive retreat for Executive room and suite guests.

The hotel’s 351 luxurious guest rooms including 20 suites offer the very latest in-room technology and luxuries like signature Conrad amenities, plush bedding and five-fixture marble bathrooms with walk-in rain showers and soak tubs. The Executive Lounge on Level 13 is an exclusive retreat for Executive room and suite guests.

Located in White Mountain Resort, Holiday Inn Changbaishan Suites is ideal for all season activities such as mountain hiking, rafting in the summer and skiing in the winter. It offers well-appointed suites with kitchenettes and free skiing and ski equipment. Guests enjoy unlimited free access of cable car and ski during the stay, while access to Water Park and Kulun Snow Ring Park are available once per day.

Located along the 41st parallel north, a great place for skiing, Changbaishan Suites Holiday Inn is a 2-minute walk from the well-known ski ranch and Hannashan Hot Spring Club. Lake Tianchi is 10 km away. It takes about 45 minutes to Changbaishan Airport by car.

hotels.name: Grand ParcVue Hotel Residence Chengdu
hotels.description_fr:
Located about a 10-minute walk from Tian Fu Square and the bustling Chunxi Road, Grand ParcVue Hotel Residence Chengdu is around a 30-minute drive from Shuangliu International Airport. The luxurious hotel offers a 2-storey health club with an indoor pool and a Pickleball court. Step out, you may walk to Jinjiang Hotel Underground Station (Line 1) in around 5 minutes.
Grand ParcVue Hotel Residence Chengdu is centrally situated close to various commercial and shopping complexes in Chengdu. You may reach Chengdu Railway Station, Wuhou Memorial Temple, Jinli Ancient Street and Kuanzhai Ancient Street in around 20 minutes' drive.
Conceived by world-renowned architect, the stylish rooms of the property are well-fitted with washer/dryer, and refrigerator.

Dining Options: The hotel offers a family-friendly restaurant serving Chinese and British cuisines, a bar, and a coffee shop. Guests can enjoy American, buffet, and Asian breakfasts.
Convenient Facilities: Facilities include a minimarket, 24-hour front desk, concierge service, and free on-site private parking. Additional services include room service, tour desk, and luggage storage.
Prime Location: Located in Changsha, the hotel is 6 km from Wangchengpo, 9 km from Yingwanzhen and Xihu Park, and 38 km from Changsha Huanghua International Airport. Nearby attractions include Yuelu Mountain and Taiping Street.

hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Rama-da by Wyndham Changsha Wuyi Square in Changsha offers family rooms with air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and city views. Each room includes a work desk, dining area, and free WiFi.
Dining Experience: The hotel features a family-friendly restaurant serving Chinese, American, Asian, and international cuisines. Breakfast includes local specialities, warm dishes, fresh pastries, fruits, and juice. Vegetarian and gluten-free options are available.
Facilities and Services: Guests can enjoy a fitness centre, spa bath, hot tub, and private pool. Additional amenities include a minimarket, coffee shop, and electric vehicle charging station. Private check-in and check-out, a 24-hour front desk, and concierge service enhance the stay.
